x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Processing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handles the conversion of rewards or points into their chosen form of value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility & Conditions
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verifies that the customer meets requirements for redeeming points or benefits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance Management
x-enumeration-literals.description: Deducts redeemed rewards from the customers reward balance accurately.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tracking & Reporting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Keeps detailed records of all redemption transactions for customer transparency and bank reporting.
